reason: Both answers correctly explain the Section 412 grace period, the requirement to register before suing (Fourth Estate), and that only actual damages/profits are available for pre-registration infringement outside the window. Both recommend registering immediately and pursuing DMCA takedowns. Answer B is slightly more accurate on the nuanced point about ongoing infringement, correctly noting a circuit split on whether continued distribution is one continuing act or separate infringements, rather than presenting it as settled (as Answer A does). B is also marginally more concise and includes a small extra practical tip (targeting Google along with the host).
